item.title: SOM v0.2 Spec Deep Dive - The Full 35-Page Founders Draft
item.description: The complete SOM Open Specification v0.2 in 21 minutes. All nine sections: why SOM exists, the story object, six architectural properties, federated identity, three vendor tiers, Skills architecture with progressive disclosure and conflict resolution, TAMS junction, open standard commitment. Plus three things not in the spec the founders should be thinking about, and actions.

item.title: SOM v0.2 Spec Summary - Quick Version
item.description: Jon's SOM v0.2 spec in three and a half minutes. Six properties, three vendor tiers, Skills, TAMS junction, plus three blind spots and actions.

item.title: SOM Onboarding Deck - Jon's Vendor Pitch
item.description: Jon's SOM Onboarding Deck in 2 and a half minutes. The gap, the model, the earthquake scenario, three integration tiers.

item.title: Pipeline Test 2 - 11 April 2026
item.description: Automated pipeline test - generated by ElevenLabs, pushed by Claude, no manual steps

item.title: Pipeline Test - 10 April 2026
item.description: Quick test pod - today's SOM v0.2 roundup
